project_focus: docs/meta/governance restructure; reporting/retro automation; CIC tool surface + vision subsystem; hook governance
key_achievements: Fixed silent root pre-commit hook collision: two competing installers (setup-git-hooks.ps1, setup-git-hook.mjs) were overwriting .git/hooks/pre-commit, and the active one had silently dropped retro-schema and roadmap-location enforcement for an unknown period

Established canonical secret-scan-hook.sh across cic-ingestion/rewrite-docs/rewrite-mcp/kb-sync, found and fixed real regex drift (rewrite-docs missing a char class) and a .gitattributes line-ending drift the parity checker itself caught mid-fix
Wired secret-scan enforcement into 4 previously-unenforced repos (root, cic-ingestion, rewrite-docs new installer, kb-sync fixed a second independent stale-hook drift in the same session)
Shipped docs/meta restructure: governance, specs, plans, phases, reviews all moved to consistent locations with fixed cross-references
Shipped daily/weekly report automation (20-task plan): agents, schedulers, backfill for 8 historical days, cowork daemon log parsing
Shipped CIC Vision Subsystem (adaptive thresholding, Gemini API) and wired it into the Harvester end-to-end (Task 13)
Fixed real bugs beyond scope in 3 separate review passes: roadmap consolidation scanner logic, PowerShell encoding in retro-audit scripts, SEC-AUDITOR self-referential false positive
Added retro schema validation gate (this file is validated against .context/retros/retro.schema.json by pre-commit)
tweetable: Week of Jul 16-23: 234 commits (195 human, 39 auto-release), 43.4k LOC, 16.9% tests, v2.2.5→v2.19.1, 9-day streak. Today: found+fixed a silent 2-installer git-hook collision that had been dropping governance checks unnoticed.
